## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aftershoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and production workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content needs refinement: less formal language, more actionable advice, and deeper explanations](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Image sourcing process to be streamlined, with flagging needed images during writing](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Focus on core topics: culling, editing, retouching, and professional photographer business growth](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Avoid Lightroom/Photoshop content; prepare for future free raw editing tool launch](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Topics

### Content Feedback and Refinement

  - [Articles generally on-point, but some sections too formal/jargony](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Need for simpler language and more in-depth explanations with examples](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Make content more actionable, focusing on practical application for photographers](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Add photographer quotes to increase authenticity and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### Image Sourcing Workflow

  - [Combination of GrowthX sourcing obvious images and Aftershoot team sourcing specific ones](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Flag image needs during writing process to parallelize sourcing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Option to publish without images initially and update later to avoid delays](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Content Focus and Strategy

  - [Concentrate on culling, editing, retouching, and professional business growth topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Avoid Lightroom/Photoshop content due to potential customer confusion](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [Prepare for expansion into broader topics with upcoming free raw editing tool launch (Q2/Q3)](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

### Scaling Content Production

  - [Implement system for gathering photographer quotes (e.g., Google Forms, help a B2B writer)](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
  - [Use existing content clusters and high-converting articles as guides for new topics](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Plan for increased content volume (potentially hundreds per month) after new tool launch](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to make edits to current articles based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [Aftershoot team to share content cluster sheet and high-converting article data](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [David to provide list of proposed articles for coming week](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Implement image flagging process during content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Develop system for gathering and incorporating photographer quotes](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
  - [Rasheed to update feedback column in content list](https://fathom.video/share/ZN_MZS54MzwFmXtgkyK7x5ZYcnmWvSA9?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
